State Licensing Reference
All States All Specialties How It Works

Speech-Language Pathologist

License Reciprocity by State

National License CCC-SLP (Certificate of Clinical Competence)
National Exam Praxis® Examination in Speech-Language Pathology
Renewal Cycle 3 years

Compact States

33

Your home-state license may already cover these states via compact privilege.

State Timeline Extra steps Fee

Endorsement States

18

Requires a separate board application with fee and processing time.

State Timeline Extra steps Fee
Alaska 4 to 8 weeks Fingerprints $250 Arizona 2 to 4 weeks Fingerprints $150 California 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $150 Connecticut 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $200 District of Columbia 4 to 8 weeks Fingerprints $187 Florida 4 to 8 weeks Fingerprints $180 Hawaii 4 to 8 weeks Fingerprints $175 Illinois 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $90 Massachusetts 4 to 8 weeks Fingerprints $225 Michigan 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $118 Minnesota 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $200 Nevada 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $300 New Jersey 4 to 8 weeks Fingerprints $120 New Mexico 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $200 New York 6 to 8 weeks Fingerprints $294 Oregon 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $200 Pennsylvania 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $50 Rhode Island 4 to 6 weeks Fingerprints $115

Try adjusting your search or clearing your filters.

How to use this directory

Start with the path filter to narrow by compact, endorsement, or CDR. Sort by fee or speed to find your fastest or cheapest route. Open any state to see the full board-verified guide with steps, documents, and renewal info.
